title: INtravel
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: First look: Amtrak enters a 'whole new era' with Airo trains for the Cascades, Northeast Regional
items.description: Amtrak is ready to debut its first new Airo trains on the Cascades line in the Pacific Northwest this summer.

items.title: Which AAdvantage card is right for you? Here are 3 options you should consider
items.description: Citi has a few AAdvantage cobranded cards that are worth considering. Which one is right for you depends on how often you fly with the airline.

items.title: New airline math: How your points and miles are shaping where your favorite carrier flies

items.title: The best Caribbean cruise for every type of traveler
items.description: Royal Caribbean, Norwegian, Carnival, Disney Cruise Line and Windstar are among the lines with top cruise options in the Caribbean.

items.title: United, JetBlue expand Blue Sky partnership, with elite perks coming by spring
items.description: United Airlines and JetBlue just expanded earning and redemption options for their loyalty members as part of a new partnership that launched last yea...
